article_title: B.C. Reg. 243/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: BC Assessment updates 2026 valuation rates for railways, pipelines, power lines, and telecom rights of way
briefs.summary: BC Reg. 243/2025 amends the Rights of Way Valuation Regulation to extend the assessment year from 2025 to 2026 and updates the valuation rate table for railway, pipeline, electrical power, and telecommunications infrastructure.
briefs.action_required: Review updated 2026 valuation rates to confirm accurate property assessment figures for your infrastructure assets.

key_dates.label: BC Rights of Way Valuation Regulation 2026 rates take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 243/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
